steps.title: Recognize the before-and-after sequence
steps.content: The key signal is the causal structure: the 2010s research had myopic geographic focus due to limited data, and then researchers gain new access to data from Asia and Eastern Europe. The blank describes what researchers do to this shortcoming given the new expanded geographic coverage.

steps.title: Match the action to the choices
steps.content:
Mitigate means to make less severe or reduce—exactly what researchers do to the shortcoming of narrow geographic focus when they gain data from broader regions.

Presuppose (assume beforehand), categorize (classify), and validate (confirm as true) don't describe this kind of problem-solving action.

That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
